texto: A player's effectiveness is directly related to his ability to be right there doing that thing in the moment. ... He can't be worrying about the past or the future or the crowd or some other extraneous event. He must be able to respond in the here and now.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Brodie sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “A player's effectiveness is directly related to his ability to be right there doing that thing in…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, this, moment, útil em momentos de moment.
